final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: professional sports photography, editorial photo
Primary request: NBA Finals highlight moment of a superstar wearing jersey number 23 completing a powerful dunk while double-teamed by two defenders
Scene/backdrop: packed NBA arena with tens of thousands of standing cheering fans, star-like flashes from cameras, polished hardwood court with visible court lines and brand logos
Subject: basketball player in number 23 jersey mid-air with perfect athletic arc, muscular definition visible under arena lights, explosive and focused facial expression, two defenders attempting to block
Style/medium: professional sports photography, ultra-high-speed action shot
Composition/framing: low-angle upward shot emphasizing height and explosive power, dramatic bokeh of crowd in background, 1/2000s shutter speed frozen motion
Lighting/mood: multi-point high-brightness professional sports arena lighting, unified color temperature, dramatic and intense atmosphere
Color palette: warm court wood tones + cool arena lighting + vibrant jersey colors + scattered white camera flashes
Materials/textures: glossy hardwood floor reflections, realistic sweat on skin, fabric texture of jerseys, polished court surface
Constraints: keep jersey number 23 clearly visible, maintain frozen motion with zero blur, preserve court markings and logos
Avoid: motion blur, plastic skin texture, deformed hands or limbs, watermark, oversaturated colors
